description: Perform a stratified Mantel-Haenszel analysis to assess confounding using the 'Classic Analysis' module in Epi Info 7. Using the dataset located at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiInfoProjects\LowBirthWeight\lowbwt.csv', calculate the Crude Odds Ratio between Smoking (SMOKE) and Low Birth Weight (LOW) and the Adjusted Odds Ratio controlling for Race (RACE). Save the full analysis output to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiInfoProjects\LowBirthWeight\analysis_output.html' and create a summary report at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiInfoProjects\LowBirthWeight\confounding_report.txt' documenting the Crude OR, Adjusted OR, and a conclusion on whether confounding is present (defined as a change > 10%).
